name: web-skills
description: Reusable Codex skills for web product engineering workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable workflows for web product engineering.
interface.longDescription: Web Skills packages focused Codex workflows for web application development. The first skill, web-flow-testing, verifies product flows by combining browser evidence, CLI setup, test identities, and durable backend state checks. Future skills can cover backend business modeling, frontend feature-state design, and other web product engineering practices.
defaultPrompt: Verify this web app flow with browser evidence and backend checks
Test the auth and checkout flow in staging
Design a CLI-backed smoke test for this user journey
